DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Beth W. Mora, Esq., Mora Employment Law, Telephone 925-820-8949, appearing for Plaintiff;
Renee E. Rosenblat, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, Telehone 415-554-3853, appearing for Defendant CCSF;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PAUL HENDERSON, BARBARA GARCIA, MARY IVAS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Defendants City and County of San Francisco, Paul Henderson, Barbara Garcia, and Mary Ivas's demurrer to the first, second, third, fifth, sixth and seventh causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
